hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(py|ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|yaml|yml|toml|sh)$ ]] && { REPO=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && cd "$REPO" && git add "$FILE" && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto: update $(basename "$FILE")"; } 2>/dev/null || true
